note: Slide master definition. Children: slideLayout references + master-level shapes (logo, watermark, default text frames) that appear on every slide. The master part itself is read-only (created by templates), but its shape tree accepts add/set/remove via /slidemaster[N]/shape[K] — same property surface as slide shapes (text, fill, line, geometry, position, font). Access via path /slidemaster[N]; 'help pptx slidemaster' is the canonical lookup — 'master' is not accepted as an element alias.

background.description: master background — propagates to every slide bound (directly or via a layout) to this master unless the slide or layout overrides. Accepts hex color (#FF6600), bare hex (FF6600), theme color (accent1/dark1/...), gradient (`C1-C2[-angle]`), image (`image:/path`), or `none` to clear.
background.readback: resolved background descriptor (hex, scheme name, gradient form, or `image`)

background.alpha.description: master background fill alpha as percent (0..100). Settable on an existing image background; surfaces on get when the resolved fill carries an alpha channel.

background.crop.description: master background image crop quad in `l,t,r,b` percent units.

background.mode.description: master background image fill mode — `stretch` (default), `tile`, or `center`. Settable on an existing image background; emitted on get only when non-default.

background.ref.description: theme background reference index — bgRef/@idx when the master inherits from the theme.

background.scale.description: tile-fill scale percent (sx, both axes), 1..500. Settable on an existing image background with background.mode=tile; surfaces on get with background.mode=tile.

direction.description: default reading direction propagated into the master's txStyles (Level1ParagraphProperties of body/title/other) and cascaded onto existing placeholder paragraphs. Accepts `ltr`/`rtl` or boolean for the `rtl` alias.

layoutCount.description: number of slide layouts associated with this master.
layoutCount.readback: integer count of associated slide layouts

theme.description: name of the theme attached to this master, when the theme has a name.
theme.readback: theme name string (absent if theme has no name)

shapeCount.description: count of background shapes (Shape + Picture) on the master's shape tree.
shapeCount.readback: count of background shapes on the master
